samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_pipe_8bit">
    <description>Unsigned 8-bit multiplier based on pipelined processing.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal for synchronization.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="mul_en_in">Input enable signal controlling the multiplier operation.</input>
        <input id="mul_a" width_description="[7:0]">Multiplicand input.</input>
        <input id="mul_b" width_description="[7:0]">Multiplier input.</input>
        
        <output id="mul_en_out">Output enable signal indicating completion of the multiplication process.</output>
        <output id="mul_out" width_description="[15:0]">Product output result.</output>
    </ports>
    
    <implementation>The design involves an 8-bit multiplier using a pipelined structure with registers and multiplexers to control the flow of signals. The main block handles the multiplication process, including generating partial products, calculating partial sums, and accumulating the results to produce the final product. The implementation details are described within the module's implementation section.</implementation>
</module>
